preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.7.1: Patch release fixing the 'update file looks corrupted' error that blocked in-app upgrades for users on v1.7.0. The CI finalize-checksums job now correctly excludes meta files (latest*.yml, *.blockmap, signatures) from the asset-coverage assertion so every real installer asset gets a SHA-256 entry in checksums.txt and the Electron updater's integrity verification passes. Also hardens entitlement enforcement with a per-invocation Ed25519 preflight so revoked licenses stop working within minutes instead of coasting on a cached token, and fixes a tooltip flicker + 40px baseline regression in the input bar.
whatsNew: Auto-update fixed: the 'The update file looks corrupted — try again in a moment' error is gone. Root cause was CI's checksum finalizer accidentally requiring SHA-256 entries for electron-builder meta files (latest.yml, latest-mac.yml, blockmaps) which never get shipped in checksums.txt — so the job silently failed and the release was published with a partial checksum file. The Electron updater then rejected every real installer asset as unverified. finalize-checksums now skips meta files from the coverage assertion, so /update works end-to-end.

Per-invocation Ed25519 entitlement preflight: every ad-platform action revalidates the user's signed entitlement token against the admin revocation list before firing. Revoked licenses stop working within minutes instead of coasting on a cached token for up to 24h. Signed with an Ed25519 keypair rotated quarterly; private key lives only in the Worker secret store.

Input-bar polish: fixed a tooltip flicker on the mic + send buttons when hovering the border between them, and restored the 40px baseline height that shifted by 2px in v1.7.0. Hotkey discoverability (Ctrl/Cmd+D mic, Ctrl/Cmd+S narrate) unchanged.
